suite.name: Location Sharing Uat

test.name: LOCSHARE-01 - Unauthenticated User Accessing Emergency Page Is Redirected To Login

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.msg: Location should have contained 'login' but it was 'https://csse0269.cpkku.com/emergency_call/emergency/'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location should have contained 'login' but it was 'https://csse0269.cpkku.com/emergency_call/emergency/'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ผู้ใช้ที่ยังไม่ได้ login เมื่อเข้าถึงหน้า Emergency ต้องถูก redirect ไปยังหน้า login
test.status: Location should have contained 'login' but it was 'https://csse0269.cpkku.com/emergency_call/emergency/'.

test.name: LOCSHARE-02 - Passenger Can Login Successfully

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath://*[contains(text(),'การเดินทาง') or contains(text(),'SOS') or contains(text(),'ออกจากระบบ')]'.
kw.arg: xpath://*[contains(text(),'การเดินทาง') or contains(text(),'SOS') or contains(text(),'ออกจากระบบ')]
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ผู้โดยสารสามารถ login ได้สำเร็จ และระบบนำไปสู่หน้าหลัก (ไม่มีข้อความแสดงข้อผิดพลาด)

test.name: LOCSHARE-03 - Passenger Can Navigate To Emergency SOS Page

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ผู้โดยสารสามารถนำทางไปยังหน้า Emergency SOS ได้ และหน้าแสดงเนื้อหาถูกต้อง

test.name: LOCSHARE-04 - Location Sharing Section Header Is Visible

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'แชร์โลเคชันให้คนที่ไว้ใจ'.
kw.arg: แชร์โลเคชันให้คนที่ไว้ใจ
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: หน้า Emergency แสดงส่วนหัว "แชร์โลเคชันให้คนที่ไว้ใจ" เพื่อให้ผู้โดยสารทราบว่ามีฟีเจอร์แชร์โลเคชัน

test.name: LOCSHARE-05 - Start Sharing Button Is Visible On Emergency Page

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page contains element 'xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]'.
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ปุ่ม "เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน" ต้องแสดงอยู่บนหน้า Emergency เมื่อยังไม่มีเซสชันแชร์ที่ active Pre-condition: Billy12 ต้องไม่มีการแชร์โลเคชันที่ active อยู่ก่อนรันเทสนี้

test.name: LOCSHARE-06 - Start Location Sharing Creates Active Session

kw.name: Login As Passenger With Geo Permission
Open Browser With Geo Permission
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.
Opens Chrome with geolocation auto-allowed (no permission prompt) via HTTPS login

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Login as passenger via HTTPS with geolocation auto-allowed

kw.name: Start Fresh Location Sharing
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Page should have contained element 'xpath://button[contains(.,'หยุดแชร์โลเคชัน')]' but did not.
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(.,'หยุดแชร์โลเคชัน')]
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
kw.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath://button[contains(.,'หยุดแชร์โลเคชัน')]' but did not.

kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(.,'หยุดแชร์โลเคชัน')]
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(.,'หยุดแชร์โลเคชัน')]
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.msg: Element 'xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]' was not enabled in 5 seconds.
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
kw.status: Element 'xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]' was not enabled in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.arg: xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: กำลังแชร์โลเคชันอยู่
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Navigate to emergency page, stop any active share, then start a new share session
kw.status: Element 'xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]' was not enabled in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.arg: กำลังแชร์โลเคชันอยู่
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ผู้โดยสารกด "เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน" → ระบบสร้าง share session และแสดง: - สถานะ "กำลังแชร์โลเคชันอยู่" พร้อม green indicator - Share link แบบ monospace - ข้อความ "หมดอายุ:" แสดงเวลาหมดอายุ NOTE: ต้องใช้ HTTPS + Geolocation เพื่อให้ปุ่มไม่ถูก disabled
test.status: Element 'xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]' was not enabled in 5 seconds.

test.name: LOCSHARE-07 - Copy Link Button Is Shown When Sharing

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Element Should Be Enabled
kw.doc: Verifies that element identified by ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ปุ่ม "คัดลอก" ต้องปรากฏเมื่อกำลังแชร์โลเคชัน เพื่อให้ผู้โดยสารคัดลอก share link ได้
test.status: Element 'xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]' was not enabled in 5 seconds.

test.name: LOCSHARE-08 - LINE Share Button Is Available And Links To LINE

test.doc: ปุ่ม "ส่งผ่าน LINE" ต้องปรากฏเมื่อกำลังแชร์ และ href ต้องชี้ไปยัง line.me
test.status: Element 'xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]' was not enabled in 5 seconds.

test.name: LOCSHARE-09 - Stop Sharing Restores Initial State

Navigate to emergency page, stop any active share, then start a new share session

kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ผู้โดยสารกด "หยุดแชร์โลเคชัน" → ระบบหยุดเซสชัน และ UI กลับแสดงปุ่ม "เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน" - ไม่แสดง "กำลังแชร์โลเคชันอยู่" อีกต่อไป - ไม่แสดงเวลาหมดอายุ
test.status: Element 'xpath://button[contains(.,'เริ่มแชร์โลเคชัน')]' was not enabled in 5 seconds.

test.name: LOCSHARE-10 - Public Share Page Is Accessible Without Login

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: หน้า Public Location Sharing (/location-sharing) เปิดได้โดยไม่ต้อง login ผู้ติดต่อฉุกเฉินไม่จำเป็นต้องมีบัญชีในระบบ

test.name: LOCSHARE-11 - Public Share Page Shows Correct Site Header

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ไปนำแหน่ — โลเคชันฉุกเฉิน'.
kw.arg: ไปนำแหน่ — โลเคชันฉุกเฉิน
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: หน้า Public Location Sharing แสดงหัวข้อ "ไปนำแหน่ — โลเคชันฉุกเฉิน" เพื่อระบุตัวตนของแพลตฟอร์ม

test.name: LOCSHARE-12 - Public Page With No Token Shows Invalid Link Message

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ลิงก์ไม่ถูกต้อง
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: หน้า Public Share ที่ไม่มี token ใน URL ต้องแสดงข้อความ "ลิงก์ไม่ถูกต้อง"

test.name: LOCSHARE-13 - Public Page With Invalid Token Shows Expired Message

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ลิงก์นี้ไม่สามารถใช้งานได้อีกต่อไป
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: หน้า Public Share ที่มี token ไม่ถูกต้องหรือหมดอายุ ต้องแสดงข้อความ "ลิงก์นี้ไม่สามารถใช้งานได้อีกต่อไป" แสดงให้เห็นว่าระบบไม่เปิดเผยข้อมูลเมื่อ link ไม่ valid

suite.doc:
UAT Tests for PBL_14 — Location Sharing Feature Story: "As a passenger, I want people in my emergency contact to check on my location from time to time." Server: https://csse0269.cpkku.com Test Account (Passenger): Billy12 / billy12345678
NOTE: TC LOCSHARE-06 ถึง LOCSHARE-09 ต้องทดสอบบน HTTPS เพื่อให้ Geolocation API ใช้งานได้ Resource file มี keyword "Login As Passenger With Geo Permission" ที่เปิด Chrome พร้อม auto-allow geolocation
